title: Leaving the Solar System
description: Stargate Journey centers around the discovery and restoration of Stargates left behind by the Ancients, a long-lost civilization whose technology far surpassed anything found on Earth. Construct and activate Stargates to establish stable wormholes between worlds, enabling near-instantaneous travel across vast interstellar distances. What once required rockets, fuel, and careful planning can eventually be accomplished with a single trip through the Stargate.
